brief: Same Character mini game lobby icon. Pixel-art casual Korean retro mood. Include 2 to 4 dot characters inspired by Kim Yeonja, Park Sangmin, Park Wankyu, Seo Taiji. Show matching same-face lane puzzle feeling, combo spark, cheerful funny atmosphere, clear silhouette at small size.
style: 16-bit pixel art, warm humorous rustic Korean arcade tone, chunky outlines, high contrast, no text, no watermark, icon-friendly centered composition

history.generationPrompt: Create a pixel-art icon for a mini game lobby featuring characters in a Korean retro style. Include 2 to 4 pixelated characters inspired by Kim Yeonja, Park Sangmin, Park Wankyu, and Seo Taiji. Capture a 'same-face lane puzzle' vibe with combo sparks and a cheerful, funny atmosphere. Ensure the characters have clear silhouettes suitable for small sizes. Use a 16-bit style with chunky outlines and high contrast to evoke a warm, humorous, rustic Korean arcade tone. The composition should be centered and icon-friendly.
history.makerChangeSummary: This prompt specifies the character count, style consistency, and mood, ensuring clear silhouettes for small size presentation. It addresses all elements like combo sparks, cheerful atmosphere, and Korean retro influence in a concise manner.

strengths: Character caricatures are excellent and highly recognizable based on the descriptions (microphone, sunglasses/hat, long hair, beanie).
Successfully captures the 'Korean retro arcade' mood with appropriate background elements and color palette.
Dynamic and energetic atmosphere with combo effects.
issues: Violates the 'no text' constraint: The image includes a title banner and UI text (Hangul and English), which limits its usage as a pure icon asset.
Composition resembles a full title screen or screenshot rather than a centered, concise lobby icon.
Pixel art grid is slightly inconsistent (mix of resolutions), though it fits the casual aesthetic.
evaluation.revisedPrompt: Create a clean pixel-art lobby icon featuring only the heads of 4 characters: a woman with a microphone, a man with sunglasses and a fedora, a man with long rock-star hair, and a man with a beanie and glasses. Arrange them in a tight, centered composition suitable for a small app icon. Background should be simple with abstract speed lines or sparks to imply a puzzle game. Strictly NO text, NO title banners, NO letters. 16-bit style, high contrast, warm retro Korean arcade colors.

history.generationPrompt: Design a pixel-art lobby icon featuring the heads of 2 to 4 characters inspired by Kim Yeonja, Park Sangmin, Park Wankyu, and Seo Taiji. Each character should be distinguished with defining attributes: a woman with a microphone, a man with sunglasses and a fedora, a man with long rock-star hair, and a man with a beanie and glasses. They should be arranged centrally in a compact, icon-friendly layout. Use abstract speed lines or combo spark effects in the background to depict a cheerful, puzzle-solving atmosphere. Ensure the style is 16-bit with high contrast, maintaining a warm, humorous Korean arcade vibe. No text or banners should be included.
history.makerChangeSummary: The prompt now focuses on iconic character heads, ensuring clear silhouettes without text, aligning with the icon purpose. Composition is refined for small size, maintaining retro Korean aesthetics and puzzle dynamics without grid inconsistency.

strengths: Excellent character recognition; the specific attributes (fedora/sunglasses, long hair, beanie/glasses, microphone) make the celebrity inspirations instantly recognizable in a caricature style.
Strong composition for a lobby icon; the 4-head diamond arrangement creates a solid, readable shape.
Vibrant, warm color palette with a dynamic burst background fits the 'cheerful funny atmosphere' perfectly.
Clear, chunky outlines ensure readability at small sizes.
issues: Minor inconsistencies in pixel resolution (mixels) between the background burst effects and the character faces, characteristic of AI pixel art.
The 'lane puzzle' mechanic is abstract, represented only by the grid arrangement, though this is acceptable for an icon.
evaluation.revisedPrompt: Design a 16-bit pixel art lobby icon. Centered composition of four character heads arranged in a tight 2x2 grid. Characters: 1) Woman holding a mic, 2) Man with fedora and sunglasses, 3) Man with long wavy rocker hair, 4) Man with beanie and glasses. Background is a dynamic comic-style sunburst in warm red and gold colors. Ensure a strict, consistent pixel grid (no mixels) for a true retro arcade look. High contrast, thick outlines, cheerful expressions. No text.
